signals.text: Zero revenue in 45-day period — funnels not yet generating sales
4 calls completed in 30 days — strong engagement cadence with weekly syncs
Very active Slack channel — Jiyoon Cha providing design feedback on Apr 3
Next weekly sync scheduled Apr 7 — consistent meeting cadence
Only 24 sessions in 7d — very low traffic, brand still in pre-launch phase
Brand actively onboarding — DNS setup, Meta integration, funnel design in progress

recent.title: Medik8 x FERMÀT|| Kick-Off Call
recent.summary: Initial onboarding kick-off. Discussed Medik8's goals for landing pages and A/B testing. Covered technical setup requirements (domain, integrations). Two demo funnels created. Weekly meetings scheduled.
action_items: Add DNS CNAME record for custom domain
Review example funnels and provide design feedback

recent.title: Medik8 x FERMÀT | Platform Demo
recent.summary: Platform demo for Medik8 team. Showcased FERMÀT capabilities for landing page creation and optimization.

recent.title: Catch-up: Medik8 + FERMÀT | Follow-up Call
recent.participants: Mukul Varshney (FERMÀT), Lindsey Shin (Medik8), Danielle Finn (Medik8)
recent.summary: Follow-up call to discuss next steps after initial demo.

calls.analysis: Medik8 is actively onboarding with 4 calls in the last 30 days. The engagement cadence is strong with weekly sync-ups established. The KOC on Mar 9 was followed by weekly syncs on Mar 16, Mar 25, and Mar 31 with Granola meeting notes available.

messages.text: I will get this Funnel updated
Pulkit Lindsay and I just aligned and we want this funnel to be updated in terms of design. The typography and CTAs are still off on this.
Just following up on the above from this thread. Can we hop on a call today so we can go live tomorrow?
I have updated the funnel as per your feedback. You can see this and let me know if I should make any more changes.
Hey Jiyoon — great call yesterday! Here's a quick recap with performance highlights, key takeaways, and action items.
Sorry have one more. Talk soon: [shared Section 2 screenshot]
Sharing this ahead of our call. We can review this together. [shared Section 1 screenshot]
Can we white label the powered by FERMÀT at the end of landing pages?

slack.analysis: Highly active Slack channel with regular back-and-forth between Pulkit and the Medik8 team (Jiyoon Cha, Lindsey). Recent discussions focused on funnel design refinements, typography standards, and CTA optimization. Brand is actively engaged in pre-launch design review.
